commands.name: search
commands.summary: Return compact ranked candidates for a legal research query.

commands.name: compare
commands.summary: Compare bm25/dense/hybrid retrievers for one query: aligned top-k, pooled union, and overlap.

commands.name: fetch
commands.summary: Return full source text for selected stable IDs.

commands.name: cite
commands.summary: Verify citations and identifiers with explicit citation states.

commands.name: related
commands.summary: Return depth-1 graph neighbours (cites / cited_by / temporal) with authority signals.

commands.name: context
commands.summary: Return structural neighbourhood: ancestry, siblings, or decision zones.

commands.name: expand
commands.summary: Return curated legal-vocabulary expansions for a query.

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Report corpus coverage, freshness, model fingerprints, and index health.

commands.name: model fetch
commands.summary: Explicitly fetch local in-process models; never implicit during search.

commands.name: setup
commands.summary: Check or prepare local configuration and optional model caches.

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Non-owning dependency preflight (embedding, models, PG runtime, extensions, index dir); does not start Postgres.

commands.name: stats
commands.summary: Report corpus/graph/embedding counts (replaces ad-hoc psql for introspection).

commands.name: inspect
commands.summary: Return the raw canonical record for one document id (full row, chunk count, edge count).

commands.name: versions
commands.summary: List an article's version timeline (every member of its version family by validity start).

commands.name: diff
commands.summary: Compare the article versions in force on two dates (which version, and whether it changed).

commands.name: session --jsonl
commands.summary: Warm JSONL subprocess protocol for order-preserving agent workflows.

commands.name: batch --jsonl
commands.summary: Finite JSONL protocol for eval and bulk verification runs.

commands.name: serve
commands.summary: Serve the JSONL session protocol over a TCP or Unix socket (single-client, sequential).

commands.name: ingest
commands.summary: Build or inspect official-source ingestion plans and canonical records.

commands.name: eval phase1
commands.summary: List or execute built-in Phase 1 LEGI retrieval evaluation fixtures.

commands.name: eval france-legi
commands.summary: Run the France-LEGI official-evidence benchmark and emit a phase1_france_legi_benchmark artifact (one-shot CLI only).

commands.name: eval run
commands.summary: Run a custom retrieval eval (your questions + qrels or external judge) and emit an eval_run artifact (one-shot CLI only).

commands.name: eval tune
commands.summary: Sweep a hybrid retrieval parameter (rrf weights / probes) against a fixture and report the metric-maximizing value (one-shot CLI only).

commands.name: sync
commands.summary: Synchronize official sources through deltas or transactional histories.

commands.name: help agent
commands.summary: Print the compiled agent-facing contract.

commands.name: help schema --json
commands.summary: Print machine-readable schemas for command requests, responses, and errors.

kind.description: CLI kind `code` maps to result kind `article`.

search_mode.description: Retrieval ablation mode. `hybrid` fuses BM25 and dense candidates.

exit_codes.2: user input, no-results, strict citation, or validation failure
exit_codes.5: upstream official API or provider failure

by_mode.description: Per-mode rank+score for this document; null if a mode did not return it.

out.description: Path to write the phase1_france_legi_benchmark artifact (also printed to stdout).

EvalFranceLegiResponse.description: phase1_france_legi_benchmark artifact (also written to --out when given).

categories.description: Per-category results; each is a FranceLegiCategory.

judge_cmd.description: External judge: reads a blind JSON task on stdin, writes {question_id:{key:label}} on stdout.

qrels.description: Path to JSON [{query_id, document_id, label}] (XOR judge_cmd).

questions.description: Path to a JSON array of {id, query, as_of?}.

EvalRunResponse.description: eval_run artifact (also written to --out when given).

metrics.description: Per-mode metric means; recall is null when no question has a relevant pooled doc.

EvalTuneResponse.description: eval_tune artifact (also written to --out when given).

text.description: The compiled agent contract as Markdown.

HelpSchemaResponse.description: This document — the compiled schema (commands, exit_codes, error_object, session_envelope, common_enums, schemas).

IngestRequest.description: Ingestion is one-shot CLI only (not available over the session protocol).

rel.description: cites=outgoing citations, cited_by=incoming citations, temporal=version family.

authority_weight.description: Decision-only authority re-rank weight in [0.0, 1.0] (default off; 0.0 is treated as off). Re-orders near-tied jurisprudence results within the same legal order by publication authority. EXPERIMENTAL: a positive weight is first-page-only (disables cursor paging for the response) and requires kind=decision (or zone); it cannot be combined with an inbound cursor.

cursor.description: Chunk cursor <score>:<chunk_id> or document cursor doc:<score>:<document_id>; must match --group-by.

group_by.description: Result granularity: one row per passage, or one row per article.

rrf_dense_weight.description: Per-request hybrid RRF dense weight (default from env, else 0.3).

rrf_lexical_weight.description: Per-request hybrid RRF lexical weight (default from env, else 1.0).

zone.description: Official Cour de cassation zone scope (case-law only): restrict retrieval to a decision part — `motivations` (reasoning), `moyens` (grounds raised), or `dispositif` (holding). Routes to the coverage-bounded official-zone subsystem (cass+inca only); incompatible with kind=code.

best_chunk_id.description: Document grouping: the best-ranked chunk of the article.

routing.description: Intent-routing audit: how the query was classified and which backend served it.

scope.description: Present only for `zone` searches: the coverage-bounded official-zone scope (Cour de cassation only).

ServeRequest.description: Bind one transport, then speak the session_envelope protocol over the socket.

ServeResponse.description: serve does not return a JSON document; each socket connection speaks the JSONL session protocol (request = session_envelope.request, response = success/error). Capability discovery via {"command":"help schema"}.

deep.description: When true, recompute and cache full replay snapshot signatures; default status reads cached signatures only.
